title: Neotainiopsis barbata
taxonomy: Neotainiopsis barbata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Cephalotaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the net veined peppermints. Neotainiopsis barbata is native to Australia, and its classification helps in understanding its unique characteristics and properties. Further study of its classification can provide insights into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
